message:
bench(supervision): add Criterion benchmarks for signature matching, pattern learning, and pattern stats (process_triage-dki.17)

11 benchmark groups, 51 scenarios covering SignatureDatabase
(construction/match_process/best_match/find_by/env matching),
CommandNormalizer (normalize_process_name/generate_candidates),
PatternStats (record_match/acceptance_rate/lifecycle),
AllPatternStats (record/get), DisabledPatterns, PatternLifecycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -164,6 +164,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "recovery_tree"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "supervision_patterns"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "fleet_integration"
 path = "tests/fleet_integration.rs"
